canonical_answer: A small, raised, reddish-brown skin lesion with a rough surface sits on pale skin showing fine lines and pores. Several long, dark hairs grow from the skin surface near and over the lesion. A yellow computer mouse cursor arrow points directly at the reddish-brown skin lesion. Pink text with a white outline overlays the image stating not to take this as medical advice.
